Document:
# Species
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Species"]
The Nuclear Wasteland has reshaped humanity in ways no one anticipated. Radiation, viral exposure, and pre-war engineering have produced several distinct species alongside baseline humans — each with their own strengths, limitations, and place in the post-war world.
## Playable Species
[bold]Human[/bold] — The most common species in the Wasteland. Adaptable and versatile. No special restrictions.
[bold]Ghoul[/bold] — Irradiated humans who survived long-term radiation exposure. Extended lifespans, radiation resistance, and a distinctive appearance that draws fear or distrust from most factions.
[bold]Super Mutant[/bold] — FEV-mutated humans of immense size and strength. Requires [bold][color=#cc3333]whitelist[/color][/bold] approval. See the [textlink="Super Mutants" link="MisfitsSuperMutants"] guide for full details.
[bold]Robot[/bold] — Autonomous synthetic beings. Requires [bold][color=#cc3333]whitelist[/color][/bold] approval. See the [textlink="Robots" link="MisfitsSynthetics"] guide for full details.
## Selecting Your Species
Choose your species in the character editor before spawning. Each species has different available roles, physical traits, and faction interactions. Whitelist species require prior approval through the Misfits Discord before they can be selected.
